title: melica calycina
intro: Melica calycina, also known as Calycinal grass or Green Millet, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and providing relief from respiratory problems. It can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
